announcements.message: Hi everyone! I just wanted to let you know that Grok AI Chat is now officially ranked the tenth most popular AI shortcut on RoutineHub! Thank you all for downloading and using this so much that now it's in the top 10 AI shortcuts!
announcements.title: Grok AI Chat @ #10!

announcements.message: Hi everyone! This is a demo of the new announcements system I have integrated into Grok AI Chat. To see this message, you must have pressed the ‘Read Announcement’ button. You can also mark announcements as read or skip them, and they will show later. Additionally, past announcements can be viewed from the Settings menu. I hope you all enjoy!!
announcements.title: New Announcements Feature!
